turns.text: Here's an aerial shot of my wheat field taken this morning. Looks pretty uniform.
turns.image_description: Aerial view of a wheat field with uniform green coloration. Even rows with no visible blemishes. Morning sunlight at 45-degree angle.

turns.text: The field appears healthy with consistent green coloration and no visible signs of disease or stress. The lighting conditions are ideal for observing uniformity.
I took another shot today. Notice the yellow patches in the northwest corner now.
turns.image_description: Same field with small yellow patches appearing in northwest quadrant. Clouds obscuring 30% of field.

turns.text:
Describe the spatial progression of disease in the wheat field?

C) Disease has spread from northwest quadrant to central area with new brown patches in southeast
A) Field shows only minor yellow patches in northwest quadrant
B) Yellow patches remain isolated in northwest with no new developments
D) Uniform yellow discoloration has spread across the entire field

ground_truth.reasoning_chain: Turn 1 established a healthy baseline. Turn 2 identified initial yellow patches in the northwest. Turn 3 showed progression to the center and new brown patches in southeast, confirming the spread pattern.
ground_truth.key_difficulty: Disease spread pattern requires tracking of temporal progression across multiple images.
